creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
It crashes because it can not find JNI library:

[2019-11-23T19:14:59,308][DEBUG][io.netty.util.internal.NativeLibraryLoader] Unable to load the library 'netty_tcnative_freebsd_x86_64', trying other loading
mechanism.
java.lang.UnsatisfiedLinkError: null

and some other related error messages.
